name: Album Continuity Check
description: Verifies album continuity rules when song files in the album directories are saved — checks sonic palette, key relationships, and forbidden elements

then.prompt: Run a continuity check on this saved file against the Fractured Shadows 12 hard rules. Check for: 1) Electronic/industrial elements after Track 8, 2) Major key usage outside T16/T17, 3) Key changes outside T17, 4) AI/robotic voice elements after Track 7, 5) Album title phrase outside T17. Report violations with 🚨 or pass with ✅.
